_comment: CHOS-502 — AWS FIS experiment template: simulate the loss of one Availability Zone and force the managed-DB failover. FIS (not Chaos Mesh) is the right tool for cloud-tier faults: it can stop every EC2/EKS node in an AZ and reboot RDS with failover. Create with: aws fis create-experiment-template --cli-input-json file://fis-az-failure.json. TODO(infra): replace ACCOUNT_ID, the resource tags, and the CloudWatch stop-condition ARN.
description: moeys: lose one AZ (stop its nodes) + force RDS Multi-AZ failover

stopAzNodes.description: Stop all EKS nodes in AZ ap-southeast-1a for 10 minutes

failoverDb.description: Reboot RDS with failover to the standby in another AZ
